title: Mermaid diagram formatter with indentation and arrow normalization
purpose: Normalizes Mermaid diagram syntax by handling indentation, arrow operators, and subgraph structure while preserving diagram semantics.
module_context: Exports FormatOptions and FormatResult interfaces, and two utility functions: formatMermaid for formatting diagrams and canFormat for validation.

steps.content: Parse the input content into individual lines.
Initialize result array and indentation tracking variables.
Process each line by trimming whitespace and skipping empty lines.
IF the line matches a diagram type declaration, preserve it as-is and continue.
IF the line starts a subgraph, increase indentation level and add it to results.
IF the line ends a subgraph, decrease indentation level and add it to results.
ELSE normalize arrow syntax with consistent spacing and apply current indentation.
Return the formatted content with success status or error details.
Extract the first line of the content and trim whitespace.
Check if the first line matches any known Mermaid diagram type.
Return true if a match is found, otherwise return false.
